transcript: these are some badlands no like they're literally badlands located in south dakota the badlands are one of the most underrated and fossil-rich masterpieces of north america paleontologists are in heaven when they come here as it is filled with ancient remains from animals like the saber-toothed tiger and rhinoceros just make sure to keep your balance when visiting
